hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$CMD" in *"git push"*) if [ -z "$TWEEN_AUDIT_CHILD" ]; then BIN=$(command -v claude || ls -td "$HOME/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude-code/"*/claude.app/Contents/MacOS/claude 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$BIN" ]; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && TWEEN_AUDIT_CHILD=1 "$BIN" -p "$(cat prompts/repo_audit.md)" > report_audit.md 2>/tmp/tween-audit.log; fi; fi ;; esac
